form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (30.58) in a Mix 1/2/3, finishing a 12 length sixth. Strong record off the draw with three wins and three minors from seven starts. Looks a leading chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (30.58) in a Mix 1/2/3, finishing a 12 length sixth. Strong record off the draw with three wins and three minors from seven starts. Looks a leading chance.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked off heels in the turn to the home straight and became unbalanced.

form.formComment: Returned to racing last start with a poor run finished last in a Mix 2/3 on March 17 over 400m at Bulli behind Woolgoolga Gal beaten 14 lengths (23.25). Doesn't look smart enough to threaten the top few.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Missed the frame when sixth (30.94) at this track at last run and returns here after a four-and-a-half months break. Has ability and worth including.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Missed the frame when sixth (30.94) at this track at last run and returns here after a four-and-a-half months break. Has ability and worth including.

form.formComment: Ran a better race when second behind Ava's Bluey at Gosford last start over 388m (22.76). Made up good ground from the back and will be strong late again. Has to be included.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (23.04) when fifth over 388m at Gosford in a Mix 3/4. Goes well out of this box with a win and two minors. Looking to others.

formComments.comment: Missed the frame latest (23.04) when fifth over 388m at Gosford in a Mix 3/4. Goes well out of this box with a win and two minors. Looking to others.

form.formComment: Hit the frame latest (22.93) when third at Gosford in a Mix 3/4. Has one success and two minors from six starts from box 6. Will need some luck to feature.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Hit the frame latest (22.93) when third at Gosford in a Mix 3/4. Has one success and two minors from six starts from box 6. Will need some luck to feature.

form.formComment: Surprised two starts back at Nowra to win by 1.75 lengths in 29.86, beating Black Tiara. Last start finished 4th on March 19 over 520m at this track behind I'll See beaten 14 lengths (31.03) in a Mix 2/3. Has claims on best form.

form.formComment: Hit the frame latest (30.14) when third at this track in a Mix 1/2/3. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed three times. Looks well placed and should feature.
